original_snippet_context: A discussion about the current exchange market in Brazil, mentioning several banks and their exchange rates.
relevant_quote: O River Plate modificou a tabella para 15 7|16 d., mas os outros bancos reproduziram a de 15 3|4 d., as quaes se conservaram inalteradas. Sacavam a 15 1|16 e 15 1|8 d., dando a melhor e o Italo, contro letras a 15 7|32 d. ; no correr do dia, porém, todos forneciam cambiaes a 15 7|16 d., contra letras a 15 1|2 d.
justification: This text provides information about the current exchange rates and market operations, without expressing any opinion or taking a stance on a specific policy or the "Caixa de Conversão." It focuses on reporting exchange values.
